title: The Solar Beings & the Morphogenetic Field
summary: 'The Solar Beings are what you will become' — the Sun as an upgrade mechanism, acting on the body-field the record calls morphogenetic.
markdown:
Asked what the **Solar Beings** are, the April 23, 2020 session answers with the archive's
whole physics of transformation in two sentences: *"The Solar Beings are what you will
become, in this present timeline, as the acceleration of the directed energy from your Sun
raises the consciousness that you have of your **morphogenetic field**, which in turn will
raise your consciousness. Your molecular structure will change. You all will become Light
Beings of higher dimensions, as time progresses."*

The **morphogenetic field** is the load-bearing idea — named in ten sessions, it is the
record's term for the energetic template around the body that solar radiation is said to act
upon. It is the field the [Upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/) tunes, the field
[DNA activation](/lore/dna-activation/) rewrites, and the field the
[2026 session](/sessions/2026-06-14-session-with-unimetrix-1-catherine-pelizzari-ches/) says
the solar flash will drive *"to 1,000%"* — awakening chakras and unifying, in its words, the
multidimensional self.

The destination is the archive's oldest promise wearing a new name: the Solar Being is the
[Rainbow Light Body](/lore/rainbow-light-body/) reached by sunlight rather than discipline —
humanity photosynthesizing its way back to what the [Fall](/lore/atlantis/) is said to have
cost it. The Sun, in this record, is not weather. It is the Upgrade's delivery system —
claimed, dated, and preserved as spoken.
